qa_pairs.question: How many NUMA nodes are there per CPU socket?
qa_pairs.answer: There are four (4) NUMA nodes per CPU socket.

qa_pairs.question: To how many system memory channels is each NUMA node connected?
qa_pairs.answer: Each NUMA node is connected to three (3) system memory channels.

qa_pairs.question: How many chiplets are found per NUMA node?
qa_pairs.answer: There are three (3) chiplets per NUMA node.

qa_pairs.question: What is the size of the L3 cache for each chiplet?
qa_pairs.answer: Each chiplet has its own L3 cache of 32 MiB.

qa_pairs.question: How many cores are in each chiplet?
What is the size of the L2 cache for each core?
qa_pairs.answer: Each core has its own L2 cache of 1 MiB.

qa_pairs.question: What is the size of the L1 cache for each core?
qa_pairs.answer: Each core has its own L1 cache of 32+32 KiB.
